notes: These are comparison windows, not final animation sprite crop boxes.
Bottom-row windows start above horn tips but below label text; the previous AIR y0 cropped the horn/head top.
Exclude rectangles mask unavoidable adjacent-pose contamination from tails/limbs before scoring.
v6 polygon pass uses traced/simplified polygon reconstructions within these fixed masked ROI windows.
These windows are the alignment gate for comparisons; polygon changes happen only after the windows are validated.
v7 simplification pass keeps the v6 alignment gate and simplifies the traced polygon sets.
v7 also adds explicit manual detail polygons (forehead cells / abdomen grids) for front-ish poses.
v8 uses the same validated masked ROI alignment gate as v7.
New work is motif segmentation / exact placement of forehead and abdomen grid cells.
v9 is a turn-based part pass: head, chest, belly, limbs, feet, pelvis, neck, and tail are patched part-by-part.
The ROI alignment gate is unchanged from v8; improvements focus on missing internal dark regions and local anatomy details.
v10 cleans up noisy internal overlay artifacts and replaces missing eyes with explicit simple polygons.
Black squiggles from v9 are treated as overlay artifacts, not intended sprite detail.
v11 retunes eye placement pose-by-pose using reference head crops.
v12 makes eye slits bolder and more inward so they read clearly on the cream face.
v13 makes eyes a first-class weighted target and updates eye polygons using reference-crop placement.
v14 specifically corrects top_front eye placement against the original reference.
